## Type of change

- [ ] Vault content
- [ ] Parser/tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm validate`.
- [ ] I ran relevant tests or explained why not.
- [ ] I did not commit local-only files such as `.DS_Store`, `node_modules/`, build output, or personal Obsidian workspace state.
